subcodes.first_line: O my beloved Khalil! For some time I have not engaged in written discourse with thee, sharing the secrets of heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل من چندیست که با تو گفت و شنیدی بواسطه تحاریر ننمودم و اسرار جان و دل
subcodes.subjects: @high station of teachers of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
